_schema.description: Global and per-category thresholds for scripts/parity_threshold_gate.py. The global threshold preserves the historical aggregate gate. The category default keeps currently passing domains pinned at 100%, while configured exceptions document known broad inventory gaps that are tracked elsewhere.
_schema.min_parity_pct: Minimum aggregate parity percentage from test-parity/reports/latest.json.
_schema.default_category_min_parity_pct: Minimum percentage for any category not listed in categories.
_schema.categories: Category-specific minimums keyed by scripts/parity_threshold_gate.py category names.

parity/dns.reason: Known node:dns module-inventory gap tracked in known_failures.json.

node-suite/stream.reason: Known node-suite stream/web abort-during-pipeto failure tracked in known_failures.json.
